description: A quality control inspector must configure Chrome on a shared factory inspection terminal according to the plant's Factory Floor Workstation Standard. This includes organizing scattered bookmarks into specific folders, configuring specific Chrome flags for performance, setting readability options like font sizes, adjusting homepage and startup behavior, adding custom search engine shortcuts, and locking down privacy and download settings. The complete specification is provided on your desktop.
instruction: Read the Factory Floor Workstation Standard located at ~/Desktop/factory_workstation_standard.txt. Follow ALL 6 sections precisely. You will need to organize the existing bookmarks into 5 specific folders, enable 3 performance flags via chrome://flags, set font size to 20 and minimum font size to 14, configure the homepage and startup pages, add custom search engines for 'parts', 'spec', and 'msds', set the download directory to ~/Documents/Inspection_Reports and force a prompt, and disable all password and autofill saving.
